title: poa alpina subsp. brevifolia
intro: Poa alpina subsp. brevifolia, also known as the Alpine Meadow-grass or Short-leaved Alpine Grass, is a subspecies of grass native to the mountainous regions of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and ease congestion, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Poa alpina subsp. brevifolia can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to create a holistic approach to health and wellness.
